entry.title: Jimmy John's Brings Back the Picklewich
entry.summary:
Jimmy John's brings back the Picklewich for a limited time nationwide on Monday, October 27, 2025, but its loyalty members get early access and can order it starting Friday, October 24, 2025.
The Picklewich is just like the chain's regular sandwiches, only served in a split kosher dill pickle rather than on bread. In addition to the returning Vito Picklewich and Turkey Picklewich, Jimmy John's adds four new varieties: Ham, Roasted, Tuna, and Veggie. Also new this time is the debut of Pickle Ranch and the Triple Pickle meal. Pickle Jimmy Chips (pickle-flavored potato chips) are also back. The Triple Pickle includes a choice of Picklewich, a bag of Pickle Jimmy Chips, and Pickle Ranch. Photo via Jimmy John's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Ghirardelli Releases New Dubai Style Chocolates
entry.summary:
The Ghirardelli Chocolate Company joins the Dubai chocolate trend with the launch of new Ghirardelli Dubai Style Chocolate, which are an individually-wrapped, bite-sized take on the popular trend.
Arriving in time for the holiday season, the new chocolate features a milk chocolate shell surrounding a core of pistachio filling layered with finely shredded kataifi. Ghirardelli Dubai Style Chocolates are available now on the Ghirardelli website and are rolling out to Ghirardelli Chocolate Shops. They will also be available at select retailers starting in November. The new chocolates are available in a 4-oz bag for $13.95 as well as large gift and bundle sizes. A 50-count gift box for $75 and a case pack (260 pieces) for $299.95 are available on the Ghirardelli website. Photo via Ghirardelli. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Jack-O'-Lantern Pizza is Back at Papa John's for Halloween 2025
entry.summary:
The pumpkin-shaped Jack-O-Lantern Pizza makes its annual return to the Papa Johns menu for the 2025 Halloween season.
The seasonal pizza features a thin-crust pizza in the shape of a pumpkin topped with cheese, pepperoni for eyes and a smiling mouth, and olives for pupils. It's served unsliced (to maintain its shape) with a seasoning packet and pepperoncini. The Jack-O-Lantern Pizza is available now for a limited time at participating Papa Johns locations nationwide. The price for the pizza varies (it starts at $11.99), but it costs $12.99 at my local Papa Johns here in Los Angeles. Photo via Papa Johns. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: The Gobbler Returns to Wawa
entry.summary:
The seasonal Gobbler is back at Wawa convenience stores for the 2025 fall season.
The Thanksgiving-friendly sandwich features hot turkey in gravy (you can opt for cold sliced turkey [not in gravy]) that can be customized with several fixings, including cranberry sauce, stuffing, and mashed potatoes. New options this year include Double Stuffed Gobblers and Gobbler Wraps. Double Stuffed Gobblers are hot turkey sandwiches with either a double portion of stuffing or a combination of stuffing and either mashed potatoes (pictured) or mashed sweet potatoes. Like the regular Gobbler, you can select your roll, cheese, and spreads (cranberry is recommended). Gobbler Wraps feature the same fillings as a regular Gobbler sandwich, only rolled up inside a flour tortilla. In addition to a hot or cold sandwich or wrap, there's the Gobbler Bowl, which offers a base of stuffing, mac & cheese, mashed potatoes, or sweet potatoes (or a pairing of two of the four options), topped with hot turkey and your choice of toppings, spreads, and seasonings. The Gobbler is available now at participating Wawa locations chain-wide for a limited time. Photo via Wawa. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Sonic Introduces New Pretzel Bacon Smasher Burger and Peppermint Brownie Bark Shake
entry.summary:
It's not even Halloween yet, but Sonic is moving on to the holidays with the introduction of the new Pretzel Bacon Sonic Smasher burger and Peppermint Brownie Bark Shake, which are available now in the Sonic App ahead of a national launch starting November 3, 2025. The fast-food chain has also updated its value menu.
The Pretzel Bacon Double Sonic Smasher features smashed and grilled Angus beef patties, American cheese, bacon, crispy-fried onions, and creamy mustard, served on a soft, buttery pretzel bun. A triple-patty version is also available for bigger appetites. Prices start at $7.39 for the Double and $8.39 for the Triple. The Peppermint Brownie Bark Shake features vanilla soft serve blended with chocolate chunk brownie pieces and crushed peppermints, topped with whipped topping, a maraschino cherry, and more crushed peppermints. The price for the shake starts at $5.39 for a medium. Both items are available for a limited time at participating Sonic restaurants nationwide. Sonic has revamped its $1.99 Menu with an updated lineup that includes the New Creamy Mustard Chicken Tender Wrap. The snack-sized wrap features a white meat, fried chicken tender wrapped in a soft, flour tortilla with lettuce, tomato, cheddar cheese, and creamy mustard sauce. Other items on the updated value menu include:
Cheesy Baja Crispy Tender Wrap Jr. Double Cheeseburger Medium Cherry Flavor Bubble Slush Medium Green Apple Flavor Bubble Slush Salted Caramel Toffee Croissant Bites
Photo via Sonic Drive-In. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Wienerschnitzel Blends New Hostess Shakes
entry.summary:
Wienerschnitzel launches new Hostess Shakes as its latest limited-time milkshake offering. The new menu items feature an entire snack cake blended into a shake.
The new shakes are available in two varieties: the Hostess Ding Dongs Shake and the Hostess Twinkies Shake. The Hostess Ding Dongs Shake takes a Hostess Ding Dongs snack cake and blends it with vanilla Tastee Freeze soft serve. Similarly, the Hostess Twinkies Shake consists of a Twinkies snack cake blended with vanilla Tastee Freeze soft serve. Prices vary, but the Hostess Shakes cost $6.19 here in Los Angeles. Photo via Wienerschnitzel. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Dunkin's 2025 Halloween Menu Arrives
entry.summary:
Dunkin's 2025 Halloween menu has arrived. The seasonal menu includes the launch of the new Candy Bar Signature Latte along with the return of the Spider Donut and the Halloween Munchkins Bucket.
The new Candy Bar Signature Latte features espresso and your choice of milk mixed with a blend of chocolate, toffee, pretzel, and peanut butter flavors, topped with whipped cream, a mocha drizzle, and crumbled candy bar pieces. You can get the new beverage hot or iced. The Spider Donut is a donut with purple icing, topped with a Glazed Chocolate Munchkins donut hole and decorated with chocolate drizzle "spider legs" and vanilla-flavored icing "eyes." This year's Halloween Munchkins Bucket gets a new look with a purple Spider Donut-inspired lid on a black bucket featuring a Halloween motif that includes Spider Donut illustrations as well as depictions of Munchkins dressed in costume. The bucket comes filled with 50 Munchkins, including Halloween-themed Munchkins covered in chocolate-and-orange sprinkles (Dunkin's classic Chocolate, Vanilla, and Strawberry Frosted donuts also get the chocolate-and-orange sprinkles instead of their regular sprinkles for the Halloween season). Dunkin's 2025 Halloween menu is available now for a limited time at participating locations nationwide. Photo via Dunkin'. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: Taco Bell - Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito
entry.summary:
Taco Bell's Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito features Flamin' Hot Fritos, new Flamin' Hot Rice, seasoned beef, a three-cheese blend, Creamy Chipotle sauce, warm nacho cheese sauce, and reduced-fat sour cream inside a warm flour tortilla topped with grilled cheese.
The burrito costs $6.49 at my local Taco Bell, but is also available as part of a $9 Discovery Luxe Cravings Box that includes the burrito, a Chicken Chalupa Supreme, a Crunchy Taco, Chips & Nacho Cheese Sauce, and a medium fountain drink, so I paid the extra $2.50 for a lot more food. According to Taco Bell, the Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito is meant to be "cheesier" and "spicier" than its predecessor, the Beefy Crunch Burrito. With the extra layer of melted cheese on the outside, it's definitely cheesier but I can't say it's any spicier. While the Flamin' Hot Rice gave the fillings a bold red hue, I picked out some grains and found the flavor to be surprisingly mild given the visuals. Mostly, it just added texture and filler. I took my paritcular burrito on a short drive home to eat it and the Fritos were throughly softened. They provided a bulk of the savory and spicy Flamin' Hot flavor as well as a hit of fried corn.
The sauces (Creamy Chipotle, nacho cheese, and sour cream) were mostly lost amid the Flamin' Hot, seasoned beef, and grilled cheese flavors. Overall, I liked Taco Bell's Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito a fair bit. The Flamin' Hot flavor goes well with the generally beefy cheesiness and there was a decent variety of textures. However, if you consider that they tested a $2 version of almost the same burrito earlier this year, minus the grilled cheese (the price is in line with the regular Grilled Cheese Burrito, however), the Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito is quite pricey and makes getting the $9 combo a no-brainer. Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito Calories - 730 Fat - 41g (Saturated Fat - 17g) Sodium - 1270mg Carbs - 65g (Sugar - 4g) Protein - 26g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Crumbl Brings Back Dubai Chocolate Brownie Through October 25, 2025
entry.summary:
Crumbl brings back its Dubai Chocolate Brownie as part of this week's limited-time dessert lineup available from October 20 through October 25, 2025, at locations nationwide.
Here's what this week's Crumbl dessert menu looks like: - Dubai Chocolate Brownie - A chilled brownie with a crunchy kataifi and pistachio cream filling, topped with a layer of milk chocolate and a drizzle of pistachio cream. - Tres Leches Cake - A vanilla cake soaked in a classic tres leches sauce, topped with whipped cream and cinnamon. - Cookies & Cream Cookie - A warm marbled dark chocolate and vanilla cookie packed with white drops and topped with a white drizzle and cookies & cream pieces. - Cereal Milk Cookie - A warm cereal-inspired sugar cookie brushed with a milky glaze and topped with fruity cereal. - Original M&M's Cookie - A warm cookie packed with Milk Chocolate M&M's candies. - Banana Bread Cookie - A warm banana cookie infused with brown sugar, cinnamon, and vanilla, topped with a cream cheese glaze and a brown sugar streusel. - Milk Chocolate Chip Cookie - A warm cookie packed with milk chocolate chips. - Weekly "Secret Menu" - A mystery cookie or dessert that varies with location. You can check the Crumbl website or mobile app to see what's available near you. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Taco Bell Tests New Cantina Fajita Menu
entry.summary:
Taco Bell is considering a potential expansion of its Cantina Chicken Menu with its new Cantina Fajita test menu at participating locations in the Dallas, TX area.
The key feature of the menu is seasoned bell peppers and onions paired with either carne asada (steak) or slow-roasted chicken. As with the Cantina Menu, all items come with a packet of Avocado Verde Salsa. The Cantina Fajita menu includes: - Cantina Fajita Bowl - A bed of seasoned rice topped with simmered black beans, pico de gallo, guacamole, reduced-fat sour cream, seasoned bell peppers and onions, a three-cheese blend, Creamy Jalapeno sauce, and a double portion of carne asada or slow-roasted chicken. Two small warm flour tortillas are included on the side. It's priced at $7.99 with either protein option. - Cantina Fajita Grilled Cheese Burrito - Seasoned rice, carne asada or slow-roasted chicken, seasoned bell peppers and onions, Creamy Jalapeno sauce, and a three-cheese blend, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla and topped with a layer of grilled cheese. The suggested price for the burrito is $5.99. - Cantina Fajita Grilled Soft Taco - A soft flour tortilla folded and grilled with carne asada or slow-roasted chicken, seasoned bell peppers and onions, Creamy Jalapeno sauce, and a three-cheese blend. It's priced at $3.49. - Cantina Fajita Quesadilla - A large flour tortilla folded with carne asada or slow-roasted chicken, seasoned bell peppers and onions, Creamy Jalapeno sauce, and a three-cheese blend, and then grilled. It costs $6.49. - Cantina Fajita Discovery Luxe Box - For $9, the box includes a Cantina Fajita Grilled Soft Taco (carne asada or slow-roasted chicken), Doritos Locos Taco, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Cinnamon Twists, and a medium fountain drink. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Popeyes' Cajun-Style Turkey Returns for 2025 Thanksgiving Season
entry.summary:
Popeyes' Cajun-Style Turkey makes its annual return for the 2025 Thanksgiving season.
Available for a limited time at participating locations as well as online for nationwide (continental US only) shipping to your door, the pre-seasoned, fully-cooked turkey needs to be thawed and reheated before eating. Each Cajun-Style Turkey weighs about 11 to 13 pounds and is meant to serve eight to 12 people. You can pre-order it in person or through the Popeyes website or mobile app. Pricing for the Cajun turkey starts at $54.99 when purchased from a Popeyes restaurant and $99.99 to get one shipped to your home. If you're curious as to how Popeyes' Cajun-Style Turkey turns out, I tried and reviewed one a while back. Photo via Popeyes. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Taco Bell Debuts New Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito
entry.summary:
Taco Bell brings back the flavor of Flamin' Hot with the launch of its new Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito, which features both Flamin' Hot Fritos corn chips and new Flamin' Hot Rice.
In addition to Flamin' Hot Fritos and Flamin' Hot Rice, the Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito also contains seasoned beef, a three-cheese blend, Creamy Chipotle sauce, warm nacho cheese sauce, and reduced-fat sour cream inside a warm flour tortilla topped with grilled cheese. The limited-time item has its roots in the Beefy Crunch Burrito but is described as "cheesier" and "spicier." Taco Bell's new Flamin' Hot Rice is made with Fritos Flamin' Hot Chips, red peppers, cheddar cheese powder, garlic, paprika, and lime. In addition to being found in the new burrito, you can also purchase it as a side for $1. The Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito is available at participating locations nationwide. You can buy one a la carte for a suggested price of $5.49, while supplies last. It's also showcased in a $9 Discovery Luxe Cravings Box that includes the burrito, a Chicken Chalupa Supreme, a Crunchy Taco, Chips & Nacho Cheese Sauce, and a medium fountain drink for $9. Photo via Taco Bell. Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Flamin' Hot Grilled Cheese Burrito Calories - 730 Fat - 41g (Saturated Fat - 17g) Sodium - 1270mg Carbs - 65g (Sugar - 4g) Protein - 26g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Paris Baguette Welcomes 2025 Halloween Menu
entry.summary:
Cafe-bakery chain Paris Baguette welcomes a slate of Halloween-themed cakes and donuts for the spooky holiday. This year's Halloween lineup includes:
- Dirt & Worms Chocolate Chiffon Cake - Riffing on dirt cups, it features chocolate chiffon cake layered with cookies & cream soft cream with cookie "dirt" and gummy worms. - Dirt & Worms King Cream Donut - A soft donut filled with cookies & cream custard, topped with cookies & cream white chocolate, cookie "dirt," and a gummy worm. - Vanilla Scream Ghost Cake - Vanilla sponge cake layered with custard cream, decorated with soft cream ghosts and chocolate spider webs. - Spider Mochi Donut - A mochi donut covered in cookies & cream white chocolate, topped with a chocolate sandwich cookie and drizzled with chocolate "spider legs." As part of the Halloween festivities, Paris Baguette will also be offering a free pastry with any beverage purchase to its rewards members on Halloween (October 31, 2025). Photo via Paris Baguette. entry.summary:
Mexican food brand Ortega partners with Cheez-It to launch new Cheez-It Flavored Taco Shells.
The crunchy hard taco shell is infused with the cheesy flavor of Cheez-It crackers. In addition to being filled to make tacos, the shell is also meant to be enjoyed as a snack right out of the box. entry.title: Krispy Kreme's 2025 Halloween Donuts Arrive
entry.summary:
Krispy Kreme's 2025 Halloween donuts are here for a limited time as the "Trick or Treat! Collection." Featuring four new, festive donuts (in a Halloween-themed box if you buy a dozen), here's what you can expect:
- The Candy Bag Donut - An Original Glazed donut topped with chocolate-flavored buttercreme, a buttery caramel-flavored swirl, and a sprinkle of trick-or-treat candy blend. - Cookies and Skreme House Donut - A shell donut filled with Cookies & Kreme filling, dipped in chocolate icing, and topped with crunchy silver chocolate cookies, a wavy line of purple buttercream-flavored icing, and a spooky Haunted House piece. - Jack-O-Lantern Donut - A shell donut topped with orange buttercream-flavored icing, Jack-O-Lantern face pieces, and a green icing stem. - Spooky Sprinkle Donut - An Original Glazed donut topped with green icing and Halloween sprinkles. As part of this year's Halloween festivities, Krispy Kreme will be giving out a free Original Glazed or Classic Ring donut for costumed visitors at participating shops on Saturday, October 25, 2025, and again on Friday, October 31, 2025 (no purchase necessary). Krispy Kreme's Trick or Treat! Collection is available now at participating locations nationwide. They can also be found in a 6-pack delivered daily to select retailers. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Taco Bell Reveals New Frank's RedHot Diablo Sauce Menu
entry.summary:
Taco Bell unveils its new Frank's RedHot Diablo menu, which features a mix of "original Buffalo flavor, Taco Bell’s signature Diablo sauce, and spicy ranch." With the launch of the menu on October 16, 2025, Crispy Chicken Strips and Nacho Fries are back for a limited time.
Here's what you can expect to find on the new, limited-time menu: - Frank's RedHot Diablo Crispy Chicken Burrito - Crispy chicken strips, shredded lettuce, purple cabbage, pico de gallo, cheddar cheese, and a choice of Frank's RedHot Diablo or Avocado Ranch, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla and then grilled. The suggested price for the burrito is $5.49. - Frank's RedHot Diablo Crispy Chicken Soft Taco - A Crispy Chicken strip, purple cabbage, lettuce, pico de gallo, cheddar cheese, and a choice of Frank's RedHot Diablo or Avocado Ranch, served folded in a soft flour tortilla. It carries a suggested price of $2.99. - Frank's RedHot Diablo Chicken Nacho Fries - Seasoned Nacho Fries topped with slow-roasted chicken, nacho cheese sauce, a three-cheese blend, pico de gallo, and a drizzle of Frank's RedHot Diablo. The suggested price for this one is $4.99. - Crispy Chicken Strips with Spicy Ranch - Four crispy-fried strips of white meat chicken coated in a crunchy tortilla chip breading and served with a choice of Spicy Ranch or Frank’s RedHot® Diablo sauce. The suggested price tag for an order comes out to $6.99. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Apple Crisp Returns to Starbucks
entry.summary:
Apple Crisp (AKA apple brown sugar syrup) is back for a "very limited time" at Starbucks in the US, while supplies last.
The fall flavor is highlighted in the Iced Apple Crisp Oatmilk Shaken Espresso. The drink features Starbucks Blonde Espresso shaken with apple brown sugar syrup, poured over ice, and topped with oat milk. While it's available, you can also add apple brown sugar syrup to any beverage. It's also used to make Apple Crispy Cold Foam and new Apple Crispy Protein Cold Foam. Both can be added to any iced drink as a customization for an extra charge. Photo via Starbucks. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Sonic Launches New Bourbon Caramel Iced Coffee
entry.summary:
Sonic adds to its iced coffee options with the launch of new Bourbon Caramel Iced Coffee. The new flavor is available starting October 20, 2025, as a Sonic app-exclusive flavor ahead of a national launch on November 3, 2025.
The flavor features cold brew iced coffee with bourbon caramel flavor (non-alcoholic), crowned with whipped topping, a caramel drizzle, and a mini cowboy hat garnish. Bourbon Caramel Iced Coffee was inspired by the winning creation from the TV series "On Brand with Jimmy Fallon." The show challenges creative contestants to design campaigns for various brands. The average price for the new coffee flavor is $3.69 for a medium. Photo via Sonic Drive-in. Read more at Brand Eating!
